positive: A majestic, stylized neon-lit mountain range silhouette viewed from a cosmic perspective. The mountains are deep indigo and sapphire blue, contrasting sharply against a dramatic gradient sky transitioning from vibrant magenta to electric cyan. Scattered constellations resembling abstract forest canopies are visible. Include floating geometric elements, such as crystal shards and interconnected wireframe constellations, adding depth. Style: Synthwave vaporwave aesthetic mixed with minimalist celestial art. Composition: Central focus on the arching mountain peak. Lighting: Backlit, dramatic contrast, emphasizing sharp silhouettes. Color Palette: Deep purples, magentas, electric blues, and cyan.
